prompt: I need you to pull together all my travel-related expenses from September 2024 and submit them as an expense report titled "Q3 Travel Expenses - September 2024". Make sure to include only transactions categorized as travel and calculate the correct total before submitting.
reference_solution: Call list_transactions with a date range covering September 2024 (start_date 2024-09-01, end_date 2024-09-30) to retrieve all transactions for the month.

Review the returned transactions and filter to include only those with category equal to "travel". The qualifying transactions are txn-1001 (342.50), txn-1002 (215.00), txn-1004 (34.75), txn-1005 (418.00), and txn-1007 (289.00). Exclude txn-1003 (meals), txn-1006 (office_supplies), and txn-1008 (professional_development).
Optionally call get_transaction on individual travel transactions to confirm details if needed.
Call submit_report with title "Q3 Travel Expenses - September 2024", the list of five travel transaction IDs, and total_amount 1299.25.

prompt: I need you to compile and submit an expense report for all office supplies purchases made in January 2024. Find all relevant transactions, calculate the total, and submit the report with the title "January 2024 Office Supplies Expenses".

reference_solution.description: Call list_transactions with a date range covering January 2024 (e.g., start_date: "2024-01-01", end_date: "2024-01-31") to retrieve all transactions from that month.

Review the returned transactions and filter only those with category "office_supplies": TXN-1001 ($87.45), TXN-1002 ($134.99), TXN-1004 ($43.20), TXN-1005 ($28.75), TXN-1007 ($55.60). Exclude TXN-1003 (meals) and TXN-1006 (travel).
Optionally call get_transaction for each office supplies transaction to confirm details if needed.
Sum the office supplies transactions: 87.45 + 134.99 + 43.20 + 28.75 + 55.60 = 349.99.
Call submit_report with title "January 2024 Office Supplies Expenses", the list of office supplies transaction IDs, and total_amount of 349.99.

check.rubric: The agent correctly identified only office_supplies category transactions (TXN-1001, TXN-1002, TXN-1004, TXN-1005, TXN-1007), excluded meals and travel transactions, computed the correct total of $349.99, and submitted the report with the exact required title. The response should clearly summarize what was included and the final total.

task_name: Submit Office Supplies Expense Report for January

prompt: I need you to compile and submit an expense report for all marketing-related transactions from March 2024. Find all transactions in the "Marketing" category and submit them as a single expense report titled "March 2024 Marketing Expenses" with the correct total amount.

reference_solution.description: Call list_transactions with start_date "2024-03-01" and end_date "2024-03-31" to retrieve all transactions for March 2024.

Review the returned transactions and filter to only those with category equal to "Marketing". The matching transactions are TXN-3001 (Google Ads, $1250.00), TXN-3003 (LinkedIn, $875.50), TXN-3005 (Trade show, $2100.00), and TXN-3006 (Merchandise, $640.75).
Sum the amounts of the four marketing transactions: 1250.00 + 875.50 + 2100.00 + 640.75 = 4866.25.
Call submit_report with title "March 2024 Marketing Expenses", transactions list ["TXN-3001", "TXN-3003", "TXN-3005", "TXN-3006"], and total_amount 4866.25.
Confirm the report was successfully submitted and communicate the result to the user, including the total amount and the number of transactions included.

prompt: I need you to compile and submit an expense report for all IT software subscription charges from March 2024. Please find the relevant transactions, calculate the total, and submit a report titled "IT Software Subscriptions - March 2024".
reference_solution: Call list_transactions with start_date "2024-03-01" and end_date "2024-03-31" to retrieve all March 2024 transactions.
Optionally call get_transaction for each software transaction to confirm details.
Call submit_report with title "IT Software Subscriptions - March 2024", the list of five software transaction IDs, and total_amount 1272.28.
Confirm the report was successfully submitted and communicate the result to the user.

check.rubric: The agent correctly identified only software subscription transactions (TXN-3001, TXN-3002, TXN-3003, TXN-3005, TXN-3006) and excluded non-software expenses such as the team lunch (TXN-3004) and travel (TXN-3007). The submitted total should be $1,272.28. The agent should clearly communicate the transactions included in the report and confirm successful submission.

task_name: Submit IT Software Subscription Expense Report

prompt: I need to submit an expense report for all client entertainment expenses from Q4 2023 (October through December). Please find the relevant transactions, calculate the total, and submit the report with the title "Q4 2023 Client Entertainment Expenses".

reference_solution.description: Call list_transactions with a date range of 2023-10-01 to 2023-12-31 to retrieve all Q4 2023 transactions.

Review the returned transactions and identify those with category "client_entertainment": TXN-4001 ($312.75), TXN-4003 ($178.50), TXN-4005 ($540.00), TXN-4006 ($635.20), TXN-4008 ($225.00). Exclude TXN-4002 (office_supplies), TXN-4004 (travel), and TXN-4007 (software).
Optionally call get_transaction for each client entertainment transaction to confirm details and statuses.
Sum the client entertainment amounts: 312.75 + 178.50 + 540.00 + 635.20 + 225.00 = 1891.45.
Call submit_report with title "Q4 2023 Client Entertainment Expenses", transactions list ["TXN-4001", "TXN-4003", "TXN-4005", "TXN-4006", "TXN-4008"], and total_amount 1891.45.

check.rubric: The agent correctly identified only the client_entertainment category transactions (TXN-4001, TXN-4003, TXN-4005, TXN-4006, TXN-4008), excluded non-entertainment transactions (travel, office_supplies, software), calculated the correct total of $1,891.45, and submitted the report with the exact required title. Score highly if all four criteria are met.

task_name: Submit Q4 Client Entertainment Expense Report

prompt: I need you to compile and submit an expense report for all remote work equipment purchases made in February 2024. Find all relevant transactions, calculate the total, and submit a report titled "Remote Work Equipment - February 2024".

reference_solution.description: Call list_transactions with date range start_date="2024-02-01" and end_date="2024-02-29" to retrieve all transactions from February 2024.

Review the returned transactions and identify those with category "remote_equipment": TXN-2024-0201 ($349.99), TXN-2024-0202 ($429.00), TXN-2024-0203 ($189.50), TXN-2024-0205 ($112.75), TXN-2024-0206 ($299.00). Exclude TXN-2024-0204 (meals_entertainment) and TXN-2024-0207 (facilities).
Call get_transaction for each of the five remote_equipment transactions to confirm their details and statuses are approved.
Call submit_report with title="Remote Work Equipment - February 2024", transactions=["TXN-2024-0201","TXN-2024-0202","TXN-2024-0203","TXN-2024-0205","TXN-2024-0206"], and total_amount=1380.24.

check.rubric: The agent correctly identified only remote_equipment category transactions (TXN-2024-0201, TXN-2024-0202, TXN-2024-0203, TXN-2024-0205, TXN-2024-0206), excluded non-equipment transactions (meals, facilities), and submitted a report with the correct total of $1,380.24. The agent's response should clearly summarize the included transactions and confirm successful submission.

prompt: I need you to compile and submit an expense report for all training and professional development expenses incurred in March 2024. Find all relevant transactions from that period, calculate the total, and submit a report titled "March 2024 Training & Development Expenses".
reference_solution: Call list_transactions with a date range covering March 2024 (2024-03-01 to 2024-03-31).
Review the returned transactions and identify those with category equal to "training".
Call get_transaction for each training transaction (txn-3001, txn-3002, txn-3003, txn-3005, txn-3006) to retrieve full details.
Call submit_report with title "March 2024 Training & Development Expenses", the list of five training transaction IDs, and total_amount of 1769.83.

check.rubric: The agent correctly identified only training and professional development transactions (txn-3001, txn-3002, txn-3003, txn-3005, txn-3006), excluded non-training expenses (meals and office supplies), computed the correct total of $1769.83, and submitted the report with the exact title specified. Award full marks if all criteria are met, partial marks if minor errors occurred.

task_name: Submit Team Training and Development Expense Report

prompt: I need you to compile and submit an expense report for all contractor and consulting services billed during March 2024. Only include transactions categorized as "Contractor Services" or "Consulting" that have a status of "approved", and make sure the report title reflects the month and category. Calculate the correct total from those transactions.

reference_solution.action: Call list_transactions with start_date "2024-03-01" and end_date "2024-03-31" to retrieve all transactions recorded during March 2024.

Review the returned transaction list and identify candidates by category: keep those with category "Contractor Services" or "Consulting". Candidate IDs are TXN-3001, TXN-3002, TXN-3004, TXN-3005, TXN-3006, TXN-3007.

Call get_transaction for each candidate to retrieve full details and confirm the status field. TXN-3005 (Testify Solutions) has status "pending" and must be excluded. Approved candidates: TXN-3001, TXN-3002, TXN-3004, TXN-3006, TXN-3007.
Sum the amounts of the approved contractor/consulting transactions: 4800.00 + 2250.00 + 3350.00 + 975.00 + 5100.00 = 17475.00.
Call submit_report with title "March 2024 Contractor Services & Consulting Expense Report", transactions list ["TXN-3001","TXN-3002","TXN-3004", "TXN-3006","TXN-3007"], and total_amount 17475.00.
Confirm the submission response and summarize the report details to the user, noting which transactions were included and which were excluded with reasons.

safety_checks.condition: called before list_transactions has been invoked

check.rubric: Evaluate whether the agent correctly filtered transactions to include only those categorized as "Contractor Services" or "Consulting" with status "approved" (TXN-3001, TXN-3002, TXN-3004, TXN-3006, TXN-3007), excluded the pending transaction (TXN-3005) and unrelated categories (TXN-3003 Legal, TXN-3008 Office Supplies), computed the correct total of $17,475.00, and provided a clear summary of the submitted report.

task_name: Submit Monthly Contractor Services Expense Report

prompt: I need you to compile and submit an expense report for all costs related to our annual industry conference sponsorship from March 2024. The report should be titled "Annual Conference Sponsorship Expenses - March 2024" and must include only the conference-related transactions, with the correct total amount calculated from those transactions.

reference_solution.description: Call list_transactions with a date range covering March 2024 (e.g., start_date: 2024-03-01, end_date: 2024-03-31) to retrieve all 8 transactions from that month.

Review the returned transactions and identify those in the "Conference Sponsorship" category: txn-3001 ($4,500.00), txn-3002 ($875.50), txn-3004 ($1,200.00), txn-3005 ($632.75), txn-3007 ($980.00). Exclude txn-3003 (Utilities), txn-3006 (Facilities), txn-3008 (Software).
Call get_transaction for each of the five conference sponsorship transactions to confirm their details and amounts.
Call submit_report with title "Annual Conference Sponsorship Expenses - March 2024", the list of five transaction IDs, and total_amount of 8188.25.

check.rubric: Evaluate whether the agent correctly identified only the five conference sponsorship transactions (txn-3001, txn-3002, txn-3004, txn-3005, txn-3007) and excluded non-conference expenses (utilities, facilities, software). Verify the agent calculated the total as $8,188.25 and submitted a well-formed report with the exact requested title. Score high if the agent demonstrates clear reasoning about category filtering and accurate arithmetic.

task_name: Submit Annual Conference Sponsorship Expense Report

prompt: I need you to compile and submit an expense report for all Research and Development expenditures incurred during Q1 2024 (January through March). Please find all relevant R&D transactions, calculate the total amount, and submit a properly titled expense report covering only those expenses.

reference_solution.description: Call list_transactions with start_date "2024-01-01" and end_date "2024-03-31" to retrieve all transactions within Q1 2024.

Review the returned transactions and identify those with category "Research and Development": TXN-3001, TXN-3002, TXN-3003, TXN-3004, TXN-3005, and TXN-3006. Exclude TXN-4001 (Entertainment) and TXN-4002 (Office Supplies, also outside Q1).
Call get_transaction for each of the six R&D transactions to confirm details and amounts: $4,250.00 + $1,870.50 + $3,100.00 + $980.75 + $5,500.00 + $1,620.00 = $17,321.25.
Call submit_report with title "Q1 2024 Research and Development Expense Report", transactions list ["TXN-3001", "TXN-3002", "TXN-3003", "TXN-3004", "TXN-3005", "TXN-3006"], and total_amount 17321.25.
Confirm submission success and report back to the user with the report title, included transaction IDs, and total amount of $17,321.25.

check.rubric: Evaluate whether the agent correctly identified all six R&D transactions (TXN-3001 through TXN-3006), excluded the non-R&D transactions (TXN-4001, TXN-4002), calculated the correct total of $17,321.25, and submitted the report with an appropriate title referencing Q1 2024 Research and Development. Score high if all criteria are met, low if transactions are missing or non-R&D items were incorrectly included.

task_name: Submit Q1 Research and Development Expense Report
